title: Switched to Pixazo Cloud API
body: We migrated the backend to use the Pixazo Tracks API for cloud-based AI music generation. No local GPU required — generate music directly via Pixazo's cloud infrastructure.

title: LoRA Training (Experimental)
body: The training feature is now available but still experimental. You may encounter bugs during dataset building, preprocessing, or training. Bug reports and PRs are welcome!
